nasb.text: So if You are going to deal thus with me, please kill me at once, if I have found favor in Your sight, and do not let me see my wretchedness.”

esv.text: If you will treat me like this, kill me at once, if I find favor in your sight, that I may not see my wretchedness.”

cnv.text: 你既然這樣待我，如果我在你面前蒙恩，求你把我殺了，免得我看見自己的苦楚。”

ccb.text: 你既然这样对待我，求你施恩杀了我吧，别让我受苦了！”
